title: Drosophila aconitase activity and reactivation
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"xke2w","text":"Mitochondrial aconitase activity and reactivation modified for Drosophila.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":63,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Sonicate mitochondria four times for 15 seconds in a Branson 450 sonicator in aconitase buffer: 50 mM Tris, 30 mM sodium citrate, 0.5 mM MnCl 2 , 0.2 mM NADP, pH 7.3.

Monitor the conversion of citrate into alpha-ketoglutarate at 340 nm at 25°C using the coupled reduction of NADP to NADPH by 2 units/ml of isocitrate dehydrogenase in 50 mM Tris, 1 mM cysteine, 1 mM sodium citrate, 0.5 mM MnCl 2 at pH 7.4.
Reactivate aconitase by incubation with 2 mM dithiothreitol and 0.2 mM ferrous ammonium sulfate for 5 min then repeat the enzymatic activity assay.

Life extension through neurofibromin mitochondrial regulation and antioxidant therapy for neurofibromatosis-1 in Drosophila melanogaster by Tong, J.J. et al. published in Nature Genetics on 28 Jan, 2007 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/ng2004
creator: Protocols Importer
